metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM filtering parser for OktaSystemLogs
properties.query:
let OktaSignInEvents= dynamic(["user.session.start", "user.session.end"]);
let OutcomeReasonLookup = datatable(EventOriginalResultDetails: string, EventResultDetails: string)[
  "LOCKED_OUT", "User locked",
  "INVALID_CREDENTIALS", "Incorrect password",
  "UNKNOWN_USER", "No such user",
  "VERIFICATION_ERROR", "Incorrect key",
  "SSO_AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE", "Logon violates policy",
  "PASSWORD_EXPIRED", "Password expired",
  "USER_ACCOUNT_EXPIRED", "Account expired",
  "DEL_AUTH_TIMEOUT", "Session expired",
  "PASSWORD_BASED_LOGIN_DISALLOWED", "Logon violates policy"
];
let SrcDeviceTypeLookup = datatable(OriginalClientDevice: string, SrcDeviceTypeMapped: string)
[
  "Computer", "Computer",
  "Mobile", "Mobile Device",
  "Tablet", "Mobile Device"
];
let parser = (
    starttime: datetime=datetime(null), 
    endtime: datetime=datetime(null), 
    username_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    targetappname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    srchostname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventtype_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventresultdetails_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventresult: string = '*',
    disabled: bool=false
) {
  database('CustomLogs').table('OktaSystemLogs')
  | where not(disabled)
  | where EventOriginalType in (OktaSignInEvents)
  | where 
        (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime) 
        and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
        and ((array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or ActorUsername has_any (username_has_any))
        and (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0) // TargetAppName not available in source
        and ((array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0) or (has_any_ipv4_prefix(SrcIpAddr, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix)))
        and (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0) // SrcHostname not available in source
  | extend
    Type = "OktaSystemLogs",
    EventVendor = "Okta",
    EventProduct = "Okta",
    EventSchema = "Authentication",
    EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.3",
    EventCount = int(1),
    EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
    EventEndTime = TimeGenerated
  | lookup OutcomeReasonLookup on EventOriginalResultDetails
  | extend EventResultDetails = iff(EventResult == "Failure", coalesce(EventResultDetails, "Other"), "")
  | where (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0) or EventResultDetails in~ (eventresultdetails_in)
  | lookup SrcDeviceTypeLookup on OriginalClientDevice
  | extend
    EventType = iff(EventOriginalType hassuffix 'start', "Logon", "Logoff")
  | where (eventresult == "*" or (EventResult == eventresult))
      and ((array_length(eventtype_in) == 0) or EventType in~ (eventtype_in))
  | extend
    ActingAppName,
    ActingAppType,
    TargetSessionId = ActorSessionId,
    TargetUserId = ActorUserId,
    TargetUserIdType = ActorUserIdType,
    ActorUsername = coalesce(ActorUsername, OriginalActorAlternateId),
    ActorUsernameType,
    TargetUsername = ActorUsername,
    TargetUsernameType = ActorUsernameType,
    TargetUserType = ActorUserType,
    EventResult,
    EventSeverity,
    HttpUserAgent,
    DvcAction,
    EventMessage,
    EventOriginalResultDetails,
    EventOriginalType,
    EventOriginalUid,
    LogonMethod,
    EventOriginalSeverity = OriginalSeverity,
    ActorOriginalUserType = OriginalUserType,
    SrcIsp,
    SrcIpAddr,
    SrcGeoRegion,
    SrcGeoLongitude = toreal(SrcGeoLongtitude),
    SrcGeoLatitude = toreal(SrcGeoLatitude),
    SrcGeoCountry,
    SrcGeoCity,
    SrcDvcOs,
    SrcDvcId,
    SrcDvcIdType,
    SrcDeviceType = SrcDeviceTypeMapped
  | extend TargetUserType = case(
    TargetUserType == "System Principal", "System",
    TargetUserType
  )
  // mapping ASimMatchingUsername
  | extend
      temp_isMatchTargetUsername=ActorUsername has_any(username_has_any)
  | extend 
      ASimMatchingUsername = case(
          array_length(username_has_any) == 0, "-",
          temp_isMatchTargetUsername, "TargetUsername",
          "No match"
      )
  // Aliases
  | extend
    User = TargetUsername,
    Dvc = EventVendor,
    IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
    Src = SrcIpAddr
    | project
    TimeGenerated,
    Type,
    EventVendor,
    EventProduct,
    EventSchema,
    EventSchemaVersion,
    EventCount,
    EventStartTime,
    EventEndTime,
    EventResultDetails,
    EventType,
    ActingAppName,
    ActingAppType,
    TargetSessionId,
    TargetUserId,
    TargetUserIdType,
    ActorUsername,
    ActorUsernameType,
    TargetUsername,
    TargetUsernameType,
    TargetUserType,
    EventResult,
    EventSeverity,
    HttpUserAgent,
    DvcAction,
    EventMessage,
    EventOriginalResultDetails,
    EventOriginalType,
    EventOriginalUid,
    LogonMethod,
    EventOriginalSeverity,
    ActorOriginalUserType,
    SrcIsp,
    SrcIpAddr,
    SrcGeoRegion,
    SrcGeoLongitude,
    SrcGeoLatitude,
    SrcGeoCountry,
    SrcGeoCity,
    SrcDvcOs,
    SrcDvcId,
    SrcDvcIdType,
    SrcDeviceType,
    User,
    Dvc,
    IpAddr,
    ASimMatchingUsername
};
parser(
    starttime=starttime,
    endtime=endtime,
    username_has_any=username_has_any,
    targetappname_has_any=targetappname_has_any,
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    srchostname_has_any=srchostname_has_any,
    eventtype_in=eventtype_in,
    eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in,
    eventresult=eventresult,
    disabled=disabled
)
